glosses.en: to do someone's hair; to put on a hat
glosses.sv: frisera; ta på sig en hatt
glosses.ja: 髪を整える; 帽子をかぶる

sentences.target: Je coiffe ma sœur avant l'école.

translations.fr: Je coiffe ma sœur avant l'école.
translations.en: I'm doing my sister's hair before school.
translations.es: Peino a mi hermana antes de ir a la escuela.
translations.de: Ich mache meiner Schwester vor der Schule die Haare.
translations.it: Pettino mia sorella prima di andare a scuola.
translations.ko: 학교 가기 전에 여동생 머리를 해줘요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在上学前给妹妹弄头发。
translations.yue: 我喺返學前幫我阿妹整頭髮。
translations.ru: Я делаю причёску сестре перед школой.
translations.pt: Eu arrumo o cabelo da minha irmã antes de ir para a escola.
translations.he: אני מסדרת לאחותי את השיער לפני בית הספר.
translations.tr: Okula gitmeden önce kız kardeşimin saçını yapıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi làm tóc cho em gái trước khi đến trường.
translations.nl: Ik doe het haar van mijn zus voor school.
translations.uk: Я роблю зачіску сестрі перед школою.
translations.hu: Iskolába indulás előtt megcsinálom a húgom haját.
translations.hi: मैं स्कूल जाने से पहले अपनी बहन के बाल बनाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Czeszę włosy mojej siostrze przed szkołą.
translations.el: Χτενίζω την αδερφή μου πριν από το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Jeg ordner håret til søsteren min før skolen.
translations.id: Aku menata rambut adikku sebelum sekolah.
translations.sv: Jag fixar min systers hår före skolan.
translations.ro: Îi aranjez părul surorii mele înainte de școală.
translations.cs: Upravím vlasy své sestře před školou.
translations.da: Jeg ordner min søsters hår før skolen.
translations.ja: 学校に行く前に妹の髪を整える。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject of the finite verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking 'ma sœur' as direct object.
Possessive determiner; agrees with the feminine singular noun 'sœur'; possessor is 1st person singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'coiffe'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite noun phrase with elided determiner 'l'' (contraction of 'le' + 'école'); object of the preposition 'avant'.

sentences.target: Tu veux coiffer le bébé maintenant.

translations.fr: Tu veux coiffer le bébé maintenant.
translations.en: You want to do the baby's hair now.
translations.de: Du willst dem Baby jetzt die Haare machen.
translations.zh-Hans: 你现在想给宝宝弄头发。
translations.pt: Você quer arrumar o cabelo do bebê agora.
translations.he: אתה רוצה לסדר לתינוק את השיער עכשיו.
translations.vi: Bạn muốn làm tóc cho em bé bây giờ.
translations.ar: أنت تريد تسريح شعر الطفل الآن.
translations.nl: Je wilt nu het haar van de baby doen.
translations.hu: Most meg akarod csinálni a baba haját.
translations.hi: तुम अभी बच्चे के बाल सँवारना चाहते हो.
translations.el: Θέλεις τώρα να φτιάξεις τα μαλλιά του μωρού.
translations.nb: Du vil ordne håret til babyen nå.
translations.id: Kamu ingin menata rambut bayi sekarang.
translations.sv: Du vill fixa bebisens hår nu.
translations.ro: Vrei să aranjezi acum părul bebelușului.
translations.da: Du vil ordne babyens hår nu.
translations.ja: 今、赤ちゃんの髪を整えたい。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes infinitival complement 'coiffer'.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'veux'; transitive, its direct object is 'le bébé'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'bébé'.
Common noun; here masculine; direct object of 'coiffer'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.

sentences.target: On coiffe Léa avant la photo.

translations.fr: On coiffe Léa avant la photo.
translations.en: We're doing Léa's hair before the photo.
translations.es: Peinamos a Léa antes de la foto.
translations.de: Wir machen Léa vor dem Foto die Haare.
translations.ko: 사진 찍기 전에 레아 머리를 해줘요.
translations.zh-Hans: 拍照前我们给莱娅弄头发。
translations.yue: 影相之前我哋幫Léa整頭髮。
translations.pt: Nós arrumamos o cabelo da Léa antes da foto.
translations.he: אנחנו מסדרים לליאה את השיער לפני התמונה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi làm tóc cho Léa trước khi chụp ảnh.
translations.ar: نحن نُصفّف شعر ليا قبل الصورة.
translations.nl: We doen Léa’s haar voor de foto.
translations.uk: Ми робимо зачіску Леї перед фото.
translations.hu: A fotó előtt megcsináljuk Léa haját.
translations.hi: हम फोटो से पहले लेआ के बाल बनाते हैं.
translations.el: Χτενίζουμε τη Λέα πριν από τη φωτογραφία.
translations.nb: Vi ordner håret til Léa før bildet.
translations.id: Kami menata rambut Léa sebelum foto.
translations.sv: Vi fixar Léas hår före fotot.
translations.ro: Îi aranjăm părul Léiei înainte de fotografie.
translations.da: Vi ordner Léas hår før fotoet.
translations.ja: 写真の前にレアの髪を整える。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular (agrees with 'On'); transitive, with 'Léa' as direct object.
Proper noun, feminine personal name; direct object of 'coiffe'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'photo'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'avant'.

sentences.target: Elles coiffent leur amie pour la soirée.
sentences.reading: /ɛl kwaf lœʁ ami puʁ la swaʁe/

translations.fr: Elles coiffent leur amie pour la soirée.
translations.ipa: /ɛl kwaf lœʁ ami puʁ la swaʁe/
translations.en: They're doing their friend's hair for the party.
translations.es: Peinan a su amiga para la fiesta.
translations.de: Sie machen ihrer Freundin die Haare für die Party.
translations.it: Pettinano la loro amica per la serata.
translations.zh-Hans: 她们为晚会给朋友做头发。
translations.yue: 佢哋為晚會幫佢哋嘅朋友整頭髮。
translations.ru: Они делают причёску своей подруге к вечеринке.
translations.pt: Elas arrumam o cabelo da amiga para a festa.
translations.he: הן מסדרות לחברה שלהן את השיער למסיבה.
translations.vi: Họ làm tóc cho bạn của họ để dự tiệc.
translations.nl: Ze doen het haar van hun vriendin voor het feest.
translations.uk: Вони роблять зачіску своїй подрузі на вечірку.
translations.hu: A bulira megcsinálják a barátnőjük haját.
translations.hi: वे पार्टी के लिए अपनी सहेली के बाल बना रही हैं.
translations.pl: One robią fryzurę swojej przyjaciółce na imprezę.
translations.el: Κάνουν τα μαλλιά της φίλης τους για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: De ordner håret til venninnen sin til festen.
translations.id: Mereka menata rambut teman mereka untuk pesta.
translations.sv: De fixar sin väns hår till festen.
translations.ro: Ele îi aranjează părul prietenei lor pentru petrecere.
translations.cs: Upravují své kamarádce vlasy na večírek.
translations.da: De ordner deres venindes hår til festen.
translations.fi: He laittavat ystävänsä hiukset juhlaa varten.
translations.ja: 彼女たちはパーティーのために友だちの髪を整える。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural feminine.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive, with 'leur amie' as direct object.
Possessive determiner; plural possessor; agrees with the feminine singular noun 'amie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'coiffent'.
Preposition indicating purpose.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'soirée'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'pour'; denotes the occasion.
